description: A 2018 proposal in South Africa to amend Section 25 of the Constitution to allow for expropriation of land without compensation. The debate polarized the ANC government against the DA and EFF, ultimately failing to reach the required two-thirds majority in parliament.

key_events.description: President Ramaphosa announces support for the amendment.
Violent protests occur in rural farming regions.
Mainstream business groups warn of economic instability.
Parliamentary committee rejects the draft amendment.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling high-intensity policy polarization where economic anxiety overrides initial populist momentum.
